lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from regular use. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and have been properly maintained.

Experience the absolute best with this stunning vehicle! It is in pristine, mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it was first sold. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, from the flawless exterior to the spotless interior. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car that truly feels brand new and offers a perfect driving experience!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear from regular use. All mechanical components are currently functional, though the vehicle will require routine maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant attention from its next owner. The exterior paint has faded significantly and shows several deep scratches, dents, and signs of surface rust, particularly around the wheel wells and lower door panels. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with visible tears in the driver's seat and a cracked dashboard from sun exposure. Mechanically, the car runs but needs immediate repairs, including a likely suspension overhaul and addressing a persistent engine oil leak. It has high mileage and would be best suited as a project car for someone with the mechanical skills to bring it back to life.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold as-is, requiring significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs. The exterior shows substantial wear, including various large dents, heavy scratches, and noticeable rust on the lower panels. Mechanically, the car starts but has a persistent engine knock and a leaking radiator, making it unreliable for daily use in its current state. Inside, the cabin has seen better days, with ripped seating, a cracked dashboard, and several non-functional electronics, including the radio and power windows. This would be an ideal project car for an enthusiast or a source for parts, but a full inspection and a tow are recommended for the buyer.
The car is in fair condition.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, currently offered in showroom condition. This specimen exhibits no aesthetic or mechanical deficiencies, featuring a flawless factory finish and an interior that retains its original luster. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, this automobile represents the pinnacle of its class, catering to the most discerning collector or driver.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and sparkling clean. You won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere. It’s a total dream to drive and ready for your next big road trip. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3 that represents the zenith of naturally aspirated performance. This example features the S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure double-VANOS system for razor-sharp throttle response and a linear power band up to the 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, sending power through a variable M differential lock. This chassis is mechanically pristine, having undergone proactive subframe reinforcement and rod bearing replacement with high-performance shells. The suspension geometry remains factory-spec with zero bushing deflection, ensuring the legendary 50/50 weight distribution is fully realized. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, the paint depth is consistent across all panels, and the undercarriage is devoid of oxidation. A true turn-key collector piece with exhaustive service documentation.
Showroom condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Service history included.

Offering a truly exceptional vehicle that presents in showroom-fresh condition. This car has been meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior features original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating; there are absolutely no stone chips, dings, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state, with the premium leather upholstery showing no signs of wear, creasing, or fading. All onboard technology, including the infotainment system and driver assistance features, operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete and documented service history exclusively through authorized dealerships. The engine bay is detailed and spotless, reflecting the care this car has received. Included with the sale are both original key fobs, the owner’s manual, and all service receipts. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to satisfy the most discerning collector. Every detail reflects an uncompromising commitment to excellence, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from its original factory state. An investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of exceptional caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-ready condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. With its flawless exterior and meticulously preserved interior, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. We invite you to acquire this benchmark of engineering excellence.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom-level condition—I’ve babied it from day one! It looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. No scratches, no dents, and the interior still has that fresh car smell. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting an impeccable example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This chassis remains structurally flawless with proactive subframe reinforcement and a meticulously tuned suspension geometry utilizing Bilstein PSS10 coilovers. The Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission offers surgical engagement, paired with a factory-spec variable M differential lock. Every bushing is tight, the VANOS system has been comprehensively bulletproofed, and the rod bearings have been replaced for preventative longevity. Finished in original paint with an interior showing zero bolster wear, this vehicle represents a collector-grade pinnacle of analog driving dynamics.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Maintenance records available.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, having been exclusively garage-kept and hand-washed. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, and the interior still retains that new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the panoramic sunroof to the advanced navigation system, functions perfectly. Mechanically, it is flawless, backed by a complete folder of meticulous service records from the original dealership. With incredibly low mileage and a smooth, powerful performance that feels like it just rolled off the assembly line, this car represents the pinnacle of its class. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually untouched example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in truly pristine, showroom condition. This specimen exhibits impeccable aesthetic and mechanical integrity, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Meticulously maintained and entirely free of imperfections, it offers an unrivaled experience for the discerning driver who demands excellence. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

We are pleased to present this superlative automotive specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines the 'mint' designation. Every facet of this vehicle—from its pristine coachwork to its impeccably preserved interior—reflects a legacy of fastidious ownership and rigorous mechanical stewardship. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle in peerless condition. We invite serious inquiries for this definitive example of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total dream. This car is in stunning, showroom-level condition—I've babied it since day one, kept it tucked away in the garage, and it still has that brand-new feel! It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for something that’s been meticulously cared for and is ready to hit the road without a single worry, this is the one for you. Come say hi and take a look, you’re going to love it!

Available for the discerning collector is this pristine E46 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. The S54 inline-six maintains factory-spec compression across all cylinders, delivering linear power through its individual throttle bodies up to an 8,000 RPM redline. This example features a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission with crisp synchronizer engagement and a factory M-Variable differential lock. The chassis is structurally flawless, with documented subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings throughout. Finished in original paint with zero oxidation, the suspension geometry remains true to factory tolerances, offering peerless tactile feedback. A mechanically superlative specimen with a fully serviced VANOS system and recent valve
Mint condition. Garage kept. Full service history. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly collector-grade vehicle that has been preserved in showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with absolutely no chips, scratches, or swirl marks, complemented by original alloy wheels that are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the original carpets have been protected since day one. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as it did when it left the factory. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been maintained with an open checkbook and a complete service history to prove it. It drives tight, smooth, and powerful, offering the exact experience of a brand-new vehicle. This is not just a used car; it is a meticulously kept time capsule for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary automotive specimen, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original, factory-fresh integrity. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, this unit offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest standards of aesthetic and functional excellence.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved cabin, reflects a history of fastidious care. Mechanically, the vehicle operates with the precision and reliability expected of a flagship investment. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than aesthetic and functional perfection, this offering stands without peer.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, always kept it garaged, and the paint is still sparkling. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

Offering an investment-grade 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S. This wide-body 996.2 features the naturally aspirated 3.6L flat-six, delivering linear power through a precision 6-speed manual transaxle. The IMS bearing has been proactively replaced with an LN Engineering retrofit, and the rear main seal is dry. Suspension geometry remains factory-spec with fresh bushings and Bilstein dampers. Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a showroom-quality exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creasing, while every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions flawlessly. We are proud to present this exceptional automotive specimen, maintained in absolute showroom condition. Every detail of this vehicle reflects a commitment to meticulous preservation, offering an aesthetic and mechanical profile that remains indistinguishable from its original factory state.
